problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
hypothesis: If Bioelectrochemical system for pollutant conversion is applied to rapidly, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
